title: Suicide or Lulu and Me in a World Made for Two
original_title: Suicide or Lulu and Me in a World Made for Two
overview: An inventor creates a camera that can duplicate what it films. Using this camera he attempts to capture and preserve a moment of happiness between himself and his lover in the hope that his duplicate self will be happy forever if the recording is projected in an endless loop.
